title: aster dumosus var. coridifolius
intro: Aster dumosus var. coridifolius, also known as the White Wood Aster, is a flowering plant species within the Asteraceae family, commonly found in mountainous regions. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Aster dumosus var. coridifolius include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe skin irritations. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of this plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be applied topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
